game_info.title: Garden Defenders: Pixel Patch
game_info.concept: Plants vs. Zombies™ 2 is a tower-defense strategy game where players defend their brain from waves of zombies by planting various plants on a grid-based lawn. Players collect sun by tapping it, a resource generated by Sunflowers or falling from the sky, then spend it to drag-and-drop plant icons from the UI onto 5 available lanes on the lawn. Each plant possesses unique offensive or defensive abilities, and Plant Food can be dragged onto a plant to activate a powerful, temporary special ability. Progression involves earning Seed Packets from completing over 300 levels across 11 themed worlds, which are used to level up plants, enhancing their stats and unlocking new abilities. Players can also compete in the Arena mode against others to achieve high scores on unique levels and climb leaderboards.
game_info.description:
**Garden Defenders: Pixel Patch**

Defend your home from the invasion of the Pixel Zombies! In this strategic tower defense game, you must cultivate a garden of defensive plants to stop the undead from crossing your lawn. Collect Solar Energy that falls from the sky or is produced by Sunflowers to plant your defenses. 

Manage your resources wisely! Plant Sunflowers to build your economy, Peashooters to attack enemies from a distance, and Wall-Nuts to block their path. Survive waves of increasingly difficult zombies to win. If a single zombie reaches the left side of the lawn, it's Game Over!
game_info.controls:
- **Arrow Keys**: Move the cursor across the garden grid.
- **Z**: Cycle through available plant cards (Sunflower -> Peashooter -> Wall-Nut).
- **Space**: Plant the selected seed packet at the cursor's location (if you have enough sun) OR collect Sun drops under the cursor.
- **Shift**: Shovel mode (Hold Shift + Space to dig up a plant at the cursor).
- **Enter**: Start the game.
- **P / Esc**: Pause or Resume the game.
- **R**: Restart the game (from Game Over or Pause).

TEST_1.test_description: Verifies the "Win" condition by implementing a basic defense strategy. The test agent actively collects sun and plants defenses.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The agent prioritizes collecting sun by moving the cursor to sun drops. It establishes a column of Sunflowers in the back, then places Peashooters in lanes where Zombies are detected. It cycles plants using 'Z' and places them with 'SPACE'.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should progress through all waves without any zombies reaching the house (left side). The game phase should eventually switch to "GAME_OVER_WIN".

TEST_2.test_description: Verifies the "Lose" condition and Zombie movement logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The agent does nothing (idles). It allows zombies to spawn and walk across the lawn unimpeded.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: A zombie should eventually cross the left boundary of the grid. The game phase should switch to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".
TEST_2.description: Verifies the "Lose" condition and Zombie movement logic.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests collision detection and plant health mechanics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The agent places a single Wall-Nut in the path of a zombie and observes if the zombie stops to eat it and if the Wall-Nut eventually disappears.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The zombie should stop at the plant's coordinate, the plant's health should decrease, and once destroyed, the zombie should resume movement.
